name: codex-notepad-librarian
description: A Windows-first Codex plugin that turns folder-based notes into an organized, searchable local memory library with portable Markdown artifacts, OCR-aware PDF processing, and idempotent action handling.

interface.shortDescription: Organize Notepad notes into searchable local memory.
interface.longDescription: A Windows-first Codex plugin that helps users write naturally in Notepad or plain folders while Codex processes .txt, .md, and PDF sources into searchable local memory with portable Markdown documents, review notes, OCR setup diagnostics, idempotent future calendar-event preparation, preserved originals, and cited retrieval.
defaultPrompt: Find what I wrote about this topic.
Save this conversation to my Notepad library.
